title: pilea subcoriacea
intro: Pilea subcoriacea is a type of plant that belongs to the family Urticaceae, commonly known as the nettle family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions, due to its bioactive compounds like flavonoids and alkaloids. In herbal preparations, Pilea subcoriacea is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
